ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The successor personal representative has failed to file the inventory and appraisal. Order to show cause will be issued to the successor administrator with will annexed and the attorney. Return date is 7/2.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

At: 11:02am, Maria Saguisag-Sid appeared in court. Her attorney is not here. She will meet with her attorney this afternoon to sign the inventory. Matter is continued to 6/4. OSC ordered earlier is vacated.
